PETITION TO TRANSFER to LOS ANGELES County
Off Calendar Sep-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305413 The Keyben Zoe Lagos Carcamo Special Needs Trust and PTR-22-305425 The Kristelle Belen Lagos Carcamo Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Geber Penate appeared by zoom for Pamela Blattner (petitioner/trustee).

Mr. Penate addressed the issues raised by the court with respect to the fees and whether it is appropriate to do a flat fee, or hours spent at an hourly rate. The court informed Mr. Penate that it will not go with a flat fee, stated that there is not a lot of money in these trusts, and these are vulnerable people, and noted that the trustee is in Southern California and that the beneficiaries are in Daly City which is San Mateo County. The court also invited Mr. Penate to file a petition for change of venue in both cases. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. (2) are under submission. Status on filing of a petition for change of venue in both matters is set for August 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Authority To Create Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shannon Vener, via Zoom, for Pamela Blattner, Petitioner; Grant Riley, via Zoom, for and with Solange Carcamo, Guardian ad Litem; Elisa Cabal, certified court Interpreter (Spanish), for Solange Carcamo.

Mr. Riley reports regarding the history of the civil matter which led to the individual petitions to create special needs trusts. The court pauses to confirm that the Interpreter is interpreting for Ms. Carcamo via telephone as testimony is provided. The court addresses three key issues which were addressed by the supplements filed by Mr. Riley in this matter and related matter. The court confirms with Mr. Riley that there is no concern appointing the proposed trustee. The court confirms with Mr. Riley that a copy of the petition in each matter has been served upon the three government agencies as required by probate code 3611(c). The court advises that pursuant to Mr. Riley's testimony, any defect in notice pursuant to probate code 3611(c) will be overlooked.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Authority to Create Special Needs Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Ex Parte Application To Advance Petition For Authority To Create Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
